_thread/TIMEOUT_MAX.name: TIMEOUT_MAX
_thread/TIMEOUT_MAX.description: The maximum value allowed for the timeout parameter of Lock.acquire. Specifying a timeout greater than this value will raise an OverflowError. Added in version 3.2.

info.excerpt: The maximum value allowed for the timeout parameter of Lock.acquire. Specifying a timeout greater than this value will raise an OverflowError. Added in version 3.2.
